subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Jináb-i-Jamshíd is with Us and in the Garden of Paradise, which for several years was the dwelling-place of the Most Great Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز خدا جناب جمشید پیش ماست و در باغ فردوس که مدت چند سال محل تشریف جمال
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @Shrines and Holy places, @thankfulness; gratitude
